violations.text: Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Beef and roasted vegetables were observed covered before fully cooling. Per PIC, food was cooked approximately one hour ago. Food was uncovered and sheet pan was placed on cooling rack. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2025
Lid is missing for the dumpster. Per PIC, dumpster company is coming later today to replace lid. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 08/05/2024

Food contact surfaces of the deli slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC sanitized slicer at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024

Various foods were observed held at 46-50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Food was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024
Food was observed marked with a day or date that exceeded 7 days. The day of prep is day 1. Food was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024
The walk-in was not in good repair. Ambient temperature was observed at 58 degrees. Refrigeration technician was called at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024
The outside dumpster is not covered due to a missing lid. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 07/22/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, mixer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/10/2023

Wood is used in the construction of platform at bottom of refrigerator in the front area. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment that are exposed to splash, spillage, or other food soiling or that require frequent cleaning must be constructed of a nonabsorbent and smooth material. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/10/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 08/24/2023
